title: mdt
description: This is a pure-client mod which adds several features that may be useful.
body:
# mdt

 This is a pure-client mod which adds several features that may be useful.

# Examples:

 Here are some of the features that you can toggle via `/mtoggle` command:
 
 - disableBlindness : Disables blindness effect.
 - disableDarkness : Disables darkness effect.
 - disableNightVision : Disables night vision effect.
 - chatMaxLengthBehavior : Controls the behavior of chat field length. Useful when working with other client mods.
 - showBarrier : Makes barriers visible in non-creative modes.

 For more information, please use `/mtoggle ... description` command to see the description of each toggle.
